title: After the Diamond Stakes: Fully Prepared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser gives her all at the Diamond
Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Public opinion of Matikanetannhauser continues
to rise. The race comes to a close with the crowd
cheering louder than ever expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, in front of the racecourse, the
reporter in the glasses finds out he's being
transferred off of the Umamusume beat, despite
just recently rediscovering his passion for the
scene.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has no way of knowing this,
of course. Full of motivation and readier than
ever, she looks forward to the upcoming spring
Tenno Sho!
